overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V depicting a nighttime walk through a rainy suburban Los Santos neighborhood. The player character walks along a wet sidewalk, crosses a multi-lane intersection as the traffic light turns green, passes a pedestrian, and approaches a railroad crossing.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: metal fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall wooden electrical pole with transformers
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
single-story commercial building with bright interior lighting and signage
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a nighttime walk along a suburban sidewalk with wet pavement reflecting street lamps. A chain-link fence runs along the left while palm trees line the right. The camera approaches an intersection with a lit liquor store visible ahead and a traffic light showing red.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
steps off curb and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk as the light turns green

notable_agents.action: man in white t-shirt crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk on the asphalt road
railroad crossing warning sign with lights

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection crosswalk as the traffic signal turns green. The ground changes to yellow-striped asphalt. A pedestrian in a white shirt crosses from the right, passing close by. The liquor store shifts to the right side as the camera advances toward a railroad crossing visible ahead.

events.description: finishes crossing the street and approaches the railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing forward across the intersection toward the railroad crossing

entered.detail: red and white striped railroad crossing barrier arms

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera approaches a railroad crossing marked by warning signs and crossing gates on the left. The liquor store recedes into the distance on the right. The scene opens into the wide intersection approach with the railroad infrastructure becoming prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked suburban street that transitions from a quiet sidewalk walk to the crossing of a wide intersection. It begins beside a chain-link fence and palm trees, moving along wet pavement that reflects the glow of street lamps toward a red traffic light and a lit liquor store. As the signal turns green, the camera advances into the yellow-striped asphalt of the crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in a white shirt. The scene then shifts as the liquor store recedes to the right, opening up the view toward the street's edge. Finally, the camera approaches a railroad crossing, where warning signs and crossing gates become the prominent focal point of the environment.
